## Summary

<!-- What does this PR do? Link the relevant issue if applicable. -->
<!-- Closes #<issue-number> -->



## Type of change

- [ ] `feat` — new feature
- [ ] `fix` — bug fix
- [ ] `refactor` — code change that neither fixes a bug nor adds a feature
- [ ] `perf` — performance improvement
- [ ] `docs` — documentation only
- [ ] `chore(deps)` — dependency update
- [ ] `ci` — CI/CD change

## Checklist

- [ ] My branch is up-to-date with `main`
- [ ] Commit messages follow [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/) (`feat:`, `fix:`, etc.)
- [ ] New code is covered by tests (usecase layer: 80%+, frontend: 70%+)
- [ ] `go test -race ./...` passes locally
- [ ] `golangci-lint run` passes locally
- [ ] Swagger annotations added/updated for any new/changed endpoints
- [ ] `swag init` was run and `docs/` is committed
- [ ] No secrets, credentials, or tokens in the code
